hypothesis: BASELINE_V1: Clean baseline with proven features — lags, rolling stats, price features, target encoding, and calendar features. Use tweedie objective, n_estimators=800 with early stopping, regularized params to stay within time budget.
EXP_001: Add SNAP interaction features (snap × lag_7, snap × rmean_28
EXP_002: Tune tweedie_variance_power to 1.5 (higher power penalizes zero-inflated counts better
EXP_003: Add day-of-week × item_id target encoding and month × store_id target encoding to capture item-level weekly seasonality and store-level monthly patterns not captured by existing encodings.
EXP_004: Add WRMSSE-based sample weights during training. Items with higher revenue/volume weights get higher training weight, so the model focuses more on high-impact series that drive the metric.
